Who I Am

The Operator
Behind the Growth

I'm 0x Darrell — a Web3 Community Manager, Content Lead & Growth Operator who builds communities from zero, grows ecosystems from scratch, and creates content that makes projects impossible to ignore. All in one person.

From scaling a Telegram from 1,000 → 150,000 members, to hosting 93+ AMAs, to writing threads that hit 25,000+ views — I don't just show up for one part of the job. I own the whole operation.

If you've been in Web3 long enough, you've probably already seen my work without knowing it was me.

🎙️  "Darrell the Fren Guy" — Crypto Twitter Community
✍️  "The Crypto Storytelling Machine" — CT Recognition

Proof of Work

Community
Case Studies

01
Fren Token Fairdrop
TON Ecosystem · MemecoinCommunity Manager & Growth Operator · Jul 2024 – Jan 2025
🚀 1K → 150K
+
The Challenge

A brand new TON memecoin with ~1,000 members and zero ecosystem visibility. No established X presence, no growth engine, no community culture — just potential.


What I Did

I was hired to manage Telegram but built an empire. Beyond my paid scope, I became the project's unofficial growth operator, content engine, and public face across Crypto Twitter — out of genuine belief in what we were building.

Key Results
  • Grew Telegram from 1,000 → 150,000+ members
  • Hosted & appeared on multiple high-traffic X Spaces
  • Wrote threads that drove off-the-charts impressions on CT
  • Introduced Fren Token to the broader TON ecosystem
  • Publicly dubbed "Darrell the Fren Guy" across Crypto Twitter
  • Community members credited me as their discovery source
"Give me a project I believe in and freedom to operate — I will make it known. This is what happens when community management meets content strategy, KOL execution, and genuine ecosystem presence in one person."
02
Move on TON
TON Ecosystem · Move-to-EarnHead of Ecosystem · Sep 2024 – Present
🌱 0 → 13K
+
The Challenge

Zero. No community, no ambassadors, no engagement infrastructure, no culture. Just a vision, a product, and an empty Telegram group.


What I Did

Built the entire ecosystem from scratch — from moderation systems and engagement rhythms to KOL outreach and a full Ambassador Program I conceived and launched independently.

Key Results
  • Grew Telegram from 0 → 13,000+ members
  • Scaled daily actives from 40 → 300+ members
  • Sustained 1,000+ messages/day at peak engagement
  • Hosted 93+ community AMAs inside Telegram
  • Appeared on 40+ external X Spaces; hosted 4–5 independently
  • Built and managed a 30+ person Ambassador Program from scratch
"I don't just manage communities — I architect them. Every system, every program, every engagement touchpoint was built by me. This is what full ecosystem ownership looks like."
03
True Miner (TMA)
Telegram Mini-App · Crypto MiningCommunity Manager · Apr 2025 – Oct 2025
⛏️ 0 → 4K
+
The Challenge

A Telegram Mini-App launching with zero community in a competitive mining niche. Needed trust, culture, and growth — fast.


What I Did

Managed the full community lifecycle from day one — introducing game nights, giveaways, and AMA formats that made the community genuinely fun and sticky, not just another dead project Telegram.

Key Results
  • Grew community from 0 → 4,000+ members in 6 months
  • Hit 1,500+ members in the first month alone
  • Hosted 30+ AMAs with game nights & giveaways integrated
  • Represented on 15+ external X Spaces
  • Onboarded and supported ambassadors into the community
  • After departure: community fell 4,000 → 2,100 and shut down
"I didn't just manage True Miner's community. I was the reason it held together. The numbers after I left tell the real story."
04
Ignite Market
Flare Network · Prediction MarketCommunity Manager/Lead · Nov 2025 – Present
🔮 500+ Discord
+
The Challenge

A retention-first assignment — maintain and engage an existing community on the Flare Network's official prediction market. Pure community health, culture, and experience.


What I Did

Built genuine community culture around prediction markets — where members don't just use the platform, they enjoy it. Daily discussions, check-ins, feedback pipelines, and events tied to real global happenings.

Key Results
  • Maintained and engaged a 500+ member Discord community
  • Curated and launched 120+ prediction markets on global events
  • Drove consistent daily discussions and platform participation
  • Served as the direct bridge between community feedback & product team
  • Multiple community growth campaigns currently in pipeline
"Retention, culture, and member experience are equally valuable — and harder to fake. This role proves I can operate inside a structured team and still drive strategic value."

What I Offer

Services &
Engagement Models

01
✍🏾
Narrative Thread Writing
Threads that make people get it — the tech, the narrative, the reason it matters. If it exists in Web3, I can make it make sense and make people care.
Brand Storylines Narrative Calendars Campaign Hooks
02
🧩
Content Strategy & Voice Positioning
Define how you sound, post, and show up online. Build a recognizable brand presence that converts attention into community and community into conviction.
Storylines Posting Rhythms Creator Campaigns
03
🪶
Ghostwriting for Founders & Projects
You get thought-leadership posts — origin stories, funding reflections, ecosystem takes — in your authentic voice. I disappear completely. Your brand wins.
Founder Profiles Origin Stories Thought Leadership
04
📈
Airdrop & Campaign Breakdown Threads
Decode new opportunities — testnets, token launches, oversubscription mechanics — into clear, trusted content your audience actually acts on. Perfect for launch campaigns.
Testnet Guides Token Launch Coverage Awareness Campaigns
Model 01
Ongoing Storytelling Partnership
Monthly threads + content strategy + narrative roadmap. Built for projects wanting consistent presence.
Model 02
One-Off Projects
Single launch campaign, explainer thread, or educational series. Clean scope, clean delivery.
Model 03
Ghostwriting & Brand Voice
Amplify your personal or project brand with consistent, founder-led content at scale.
Model 04
Campaign Storytelling
Product launches, ecosystem updates, community narratives — full arc, start to finish.
Add-ons
Repurpose threads → articles/newsletters Short video explainer scripts Founder profile ghostwriting Content audits (flow, clarity, engagement) Growth hooks & virality consulting
